name: Saturday With Dad
overview: This series shows the life journey and struggle of a husband and wife, Gunawan and Itje. Knowing that his death is imminent, Gunawan made a series of videos to accompany his two sons, Satya and Cakra. Gunawan instructed Itje to let the sons watch the videos he prepared every Saturday.

trailers.title: Sabtu Bersama Bapak | Official Trailer | Vino G Bastian, Marsha Timothy, Adipati Dolken, Rey Mbayang
